title: Correction Record
description: A durable record of a human correction/change request, applied by the learning loop (pipeline/loop.md) to a permanent artifact so the same mistake does not recur.

target_id.description: e.g. editor, humanizer, devils-advocate, interpretation_support, roster.

problem.description: What was wrong, in the human's words.

correction.description: The specific fix that was requested.

change.description: What changed in the repo so it does not recur.

source_turn.description: Conversation turn the correction came from, for traceability.

changelog_ref.description: CHANGELOG entry id (e.g. LEARN-01) once applied.
